_comment: Reality config that should score green across all 5 indicators. SNI not in our top1k.json (static.naver.net is rank-free), port 2083 (recommended), 4 hex shortIds (≤8, ≥4 chars, deduped, non-zero), connIdle 90s (≤120s recommended). asn_match runs in CLI test with --vps-asn matching the static.naver.net ASN we'll monkey-patch.
